purple_motion.name: Jonne Valtonen
purple_motion.bio: Pioneering PC tracker musician of Future Crew. Creator of breathtaking synth MODs like Starshine and Unreal.

skaven.name: Peter Hajba
skaven.bio: Incredibly talented tracker audio wizard and pixel artist. Co-designer of classic PC demo effects.

unreal_coder.name: Sami Tammilehto
unreal_coder.bio: Main code architect behind Second Reality. Known for fast software polygon texture mappers and assembler loops.

wildfire_coder.name: Mika T.
wildfire_coder.bio: Finnish multi-talent in Future Crew. Known for real-time plasma effects and texture mapping innovations that defined the PC demo aesthetic of the early 90s.

pixel_artist.name: Tomi K.
pixel_artist.bio: Legendary pixel artist of Future Crew. Creator of iconic 256-color VGA backdrops and copper-driven landscape art that defined the visual identity of Second Reality.

dxyre.name: Eric G.
dxyre.bio: Prolific artist on Commodore Amiga. Excellent with metal textures and robotic pixel logos.

trix_art.name: Garry G.
trix_art.bio: C64 multi-color pixel master. Known for pushing the VIC-II's palette constraints to complete hyper-real portraits.

chaos_coder.name: Claudio G.
chaos_coder.bio: Pioneer of extreme software procedural compression and DirectX API tricks. Main coder behind '.fr-08: Werkzeug'.

ranger_c64.name: Morten S.
ranger_c64.bio: Freelance 8-bit assembly freak. Passionate about 6502 register instructions and low-level raster line hacks.

audio_drifter.name: Marc H.
audio_drifter.bio: A highly motivated tracker musician who composes upbeat chiptunes and Amiga synth loops.

vectra_pixel.name: Sonia R.
vectra_pixel.bio: Enthusiastic female pixel artist starting in VGA mode 13h. Loves copper colors and space backgrounds.

hype_ops.name: Dirk M.
hype_ops.bio: An energetic BBS sysop and organizer. Knows every swapper in Europe and spreads disk magazines wide and far.

gibson_coder.name: Sebastien C.
gibson_coder.bio: French 6502 assembly virtuoso. Master of raster interrupts and VIC-II sprite multiplexing. Key coder of Crest's legendary Deus Ex Machina.

zardax_coder.name: Jesper K.
zardax_coder.bio: Swedish Amiga coder known for smooth vector routines and copper list wizardry. One of the masterminds behind Spaceballs' legendary State of the Art demo.

prowizard_scener.name: Mikael H.
prowizard_scener.bio: Amiga tracker virtuoso in the golden-era Spaceballs crew. Wrote the haunting synth soundtracks that defined the Amiga demo aesthetic.

crypton_coder.name: Ralf V.
crypton_coder.bio: German demo coder pushing x86 assembly to its limits. Pioneer of real-time plasma and fire effects on early Pentium hardware for Triton.

sir_coder.name: Thomas B.
sir_coder.bio: German 80x86 assembly virtuoso in Triton. Creator of incredibly optimized polygon pipelines and real-time texture mappers that set the standard for PC demos.

flame_coder.name: Kai H.
flame_coder.bio: German effect coder in Triton known for pushing copper-powered palette effects and procedural fire/plasma routines to their absolute limit on Amiga hardware.

dune_coder.name: Markus S.
dune_coder.bio: Demo director and composer for Triton. Brings a musical ear to production pacing, ensuring every Triton release has perfectly synchronized audio-visual flow.

groo_coder.name: Frank W.
groo_coder.bio: German effect and engine coder in Triton. Specialist in real-time voxel landscapes and early software 3D rendering techniques on DOS-based PC hardware.

membrane_coder.name: Tuomas P.
membrane_coder.bio: Finnish demo coder specialising in algorithmically generated textures and Gouraud-shaded polygon engines for Complex.

jugi_coder.name: Jukka I.
jugi_coder.bio: Finnish assembly wizard in Complex. Master of 3D rasterization and software polygon engines. Known for pushing the Pentium's FPU to its absolute limits.

rez_coder.name: Antti V.
rez_coder.bio: Versatile Amiga coder in Complex. Specialist in copper-driven visual effects and smooth blitter animation loops that push the A500 beyond its specs.

ziphoid_coder.name: Sami H.
ziphoid_coder.bio: Finnish graphics coder in Complex. Early adopter of 3Dfx Glide and OpenGL for demo rendering. Bridged the gap between software 3D and hardware acceleration.

tempest_coder.name: Janne L.
tempest_coder.bio: Demo director and organizer for Complex. Known for coordinating multi-coder productions and ensuring every release hits its deadline with cohesive artistic vision.

sync_coder.name: Lars E.
sync_coder.bio: Freelance Amiga effect coder known for clean copper and blitter routines. Works across several crews, never staying long in one group.

wizard_of_pixels.name: Elena V.
wizard_of_pixels.bio: Rising star pixel artist with an eye for luminous VGA color palettes. Known for ethereal backgrounds and detailed pixel font design.

spot_coder.name: Anders J.
spot_coder.bio: Swedish 6502 assembly master in The Black Lotus. Creator of cycle-perfect C64 raster effects and sprite multiplexers that revolutionized 8-bit demo coding.

sunspire_coder.name: Henrik N.
sunspire_coder.bio: Swedish Amiga effect coder in The Black Lotus. Known for smooth rotoscoping, copper bar wizardry, and pushing the A500 blitter beyond its documented limits.

dex_coder.name: Magnus P.
dex_coder.bio: Swedish 3D pioneer in The Black Lotus. Early adopter of OpenGL for demo rendering. Known for real-time particle systems and software vertex pipelines.

britelite_artist.name: Erik L.
britelite_artist.bio: Swedish pixel artist in The Black Lotus. Master of Amiga 32-color palettes and copper-driven gradient skies. Known for atmospheric fantasy landscapes.

marvel_coder.name: Oskar S.
marvel_coder.bio: Swedish demo director in The Black Lotus. Orchestrates the group's multi-scene megademos with cinematic pacing and cross-scene musical cohesion.

tractor_coder.name: Jussi K.
tractor_coder.bio: Finnish 68000 assembly master in CNCD. Creator of meticulously optimized blitter routines and copper lists that extract every cycle from the Amiga 500.

melwyn_coder.name: Petri S.
melwyn_coder.bio: Finnish effect coder in CNCD. Known for smooth rotozoomers, plasma clouds, and 3D starfields that became the visual signature of CNCD's PC productions.

dr_yes_coder.name: Tommi M.
dr_yes_coder.bio: Finnish 3D graphics pioneer in CNCD. Early explorer of real-time Gouraud shading and texture mapping on Pentium hardware, pushing CNCD to the PC frontier.

mop_coder.name: Mika R.
mop_coder.bio: Finnish demo director in Orange. Known for tight scene-to-scene transitions and musical synchronization that elevate Orange's productions above their technical specs.

pirx_coder.name: Vesa L.
pirx_coder.bio: Finnish effect coder in Orange. Master of the Amiga 500's copper/blitter combination, creating multi-layered parallax scrolls and smooth vector tunnels.

nalle_artist.name: Jarkko P.
nalle_artist.bio: Finnish pixel artist in Orange. Specializes in C64 multicolor character mode art, creating rich landscapes and detailed faces with only 4 colors per cell.

uncle_x_coder.name: Timo N.
uncle_x_coder.bio: Finnish coder active in both Orange and Extend. Known for highly optimized x86 assembler routines and real-time texture mapping on budget PC hardware.

marq_coder.name: Pasi O.
marq_coder.bio: Legendary Finnish 68000 coder in Byterapers. Creator of impossibly optimized blitter loops and copper-driven effects that defined the Amiga demo aesthetic.

tomcat_coder.name: Sami K.
tomcat_coder.bio: Finnish effect coder in Byterapers. Known for pushing the Amiga 1200's AGA chipset to its limits with true-color HAM8 mode and smooth 50fps copper effects.

moby_musician.name: Mikael A.
moby_musician.bio: Prolific Finnish tracker musician in Byterapers (also active in Bomb). Known for energetic, melodic MODs that blend chiptune grit with dance-floor grooves.

mfx_coder.name: Markus F.
mfx_coder.bio: Finnish 3D coder in Extend. Pioneer of real-time environmental mapping and Phong shading on early Pentium hardware, pushing the boundaries of software rendering.

rapture_coder.name: Juha T.
rapture_coder.bio: Finnish effect coder in Extend. Known for AGA chipset effects including copper-driven palette animation and blitter-based sprite multiplexing on the A1200.

farfar_coder.name: Boris D.
farfar_coder.bio: German 3D graphics pioneer in Haujobb. Master of real-time bump mapping and environment-mapped reflections, consistently pushing the visual envelope.

alien_coder.name: Ralf M.
alien_coder.bio: German Amiga coder in Haujobb. Known for deeply optimized 68000 assembly routines and real-time 3D vector transformations on the Amiga 500 platform.

boyc_coder.name: Zoltan S.
boyc_coder.bio: Hungarian 80x86 assembly genius in Conspiracy. Pioneer of extreme size optimization for 4K intros, achieving stunning visuals in absurdly small binaries.

gargaj_coder.name: Szabolcs K.
gargaj_coder.bio: Hungarian demo director and composer in Conspiracy (also active in ASD). Known for blending pixel art with procedural effects and curating cohesive compo entries.

visy_coder.name: Gabor V.
visy_coder.bio: Hungarian effect coder in Conspiracy. Known for smooth 2D particle effects, real-time fire animations, and wobble effects that became Conspiracy's visual signature.

truck_coder.name: Andreas W.
truck_coder.bio: German 3D programmer in ASD. Expert in programmed vertex and fragment shaders on early programmable hardware. Known for procedural generation techniques.

thedeadliner_coder.name: Christian B.
thedeadliner_coder.bio: German effect coder in ASD. Known for last-minute code heroics and stunning procedural texture generation that elevates ASD's compo entries under tight deadlines.

virgill_coder.name: Steffen S.
virgill_coder.bio: German demo director in Cocoon. Known for meticulous scene flow, multi-part megademos, and ensuring every Cocoon release tells a coherent artistic story.

h2o_coder.name: Martin K.
h2o_coder.bio: German effect coder in Cocoon. Creator of fluid particle systems and dynamic light sourcing effects that give Cocoon's productions their distinctive visual warmth.

bitbreaker_coder.name: Thomas S.
bitbreaker_coder.bio: German 6502 assembly legend in Rebels. Master of C64 raster interrupts and sprite multiplexing, known for squeezing impossible effects out of the VIC-II.

hoffman_coder.name: Daniel H.
hoffman_coder.bio: Finnish effect coder in Rebels. Known for real-time 2D vector engines, rotozoomers with sub-pixel precision, and clean code that other coders study.

deetsay_coder.name: Joonas T.
deetsay_coder.bio: Finnish tracker musician in Rebels. Composes energetic 4-channel and 8-channel MODs with a distinctive melodic style, providing the sonic backbone for Rebels' demos.

jazzcat_coder.name: Mikael N.
jazzcat_coder.bio: Swedish scene organizer and disk-mag editor connected to Scoopex. Runs one of Europe's most active BBS nodes and distributes demo compilations internationally.

tsm_coder.name: Lars T.
tsm_coder.bio: Swedish 68000 assembly coder in Scoopex. Known for deeply optimized copper-driven effects and blitter routines that wring maximum performance from the A1200 AGA.

facet_artist.name: Anders B.
facet_artist.bio: Swedish pixel art legend in Scoopex. Master of 32-color Amiga palettes, HAM mode landscapes, and copper-driven gradient skies. One of the most influential pixel artists in the European scene.

dane_coder.name: Klaus D.
dane_coder.bio: Danish demo director in Kefrens (also active with Dreamdealers). Known for orchestrating complex megademos with layered scene progressions and immersive atmosphere.

red_devil_coder.name: Soren J.
red_devil_coder.bio: Danish C64 coder in Kefrens. Master of the VIC-II's raster capabilities, creating multi-color FLI effects and smooth sine-scrollers that defined Kefrens' 8-bit productions.

zodiak_coder.name: Jesper L.
zodiak_coder.bio: Danish tracker musician in Kefrens. Creator of atmospheric 4-channel and 6-channel MODs that blend haunting melodies with driving rhythms, defining Kefrens' sonic identity.

photon_coder.name: Eirik N.
photon_coder.bio: Norwegian effect coder in Sanity. Known for clean blitter routines, smooth copper transitions, and particle-style effects on the Amiga 500 platform.

optic_artist.name: Geir H.
optic_artist.bio: Norwegian pixel artist in Sanity. Master of the Amiga 32-color palette, creating rich atmospheric backdrops and detailed pixel typography for Sanity's demos.

sulevi_coder.name: Antti S.
sulevi_coder.bio: Finnish demo director in Melon Dezign. Known for coordinating multi-artist productions and crafting cohesive demo narratives with scene-to-scene flow.

mellow_d_musician.name: Petri K.
mellow_d_musician.bio: Finnish tracker musician in Melon Dezign (also active in Bomb). Known for deeply melodic MODs with rich synth pads and driving beats that define the Finnish demo sound.

silent_shadow_coder.name: Jani K.
silent_shadow_coder.bio: Finnish effect coder in Silents. Known for polished Amiga 500 copper-driven animation sequences and atmospheric rotozoomers with seamless palette cycling.

nocturne_artist.name: Anna T.
nocturne_artist.bio: Finnish pixel artist in Silents. Creates haunting, low-light AGA landscapes with rich 256-color palettes and copper-enhanced gradient night skies.

lizardking_musician.name: Magnus K.
lizardking_musician.bio: Swedish tracker music legend associated with Bomb. One of the most prolific module composers in the demoscene, known for technically complex and emotionally resonant compositions.

count_zero_coder.name: Stefan L.
count_zero_coder.bio: European 6502 assembly master in TRSI. Known for cycle-perfect C64 raster interrupts, sprite multiplexers, and incredibly tight code that defined TRSI's technical reputation.

krashan_coder.name: Krzysztof P.
krashan_coder.bio: European effect coder in TRSI. Expert in Amiga 1200 AGA chipset effects, including true-color HAM8 rendering and smooth 50fps copper-driven animation sequences.

zodiac_coder.name: Lars S.
zodiac_coder.bio: Swedish Amiga effect coder in Dreamdealers. Known for copper-driven gradient effects, smooth vector tunnels, and atmospheric 2D particle systems on the A500.

diff_coder.name: Peter N.
diff_coder.bio: Swedish effect coder in Alcatraz. Specialist in Amiga 500 blitter manipulation and copper list optimization, creating multi-layered visual effects with minimal CPU overhead.

triace_coder.name: Mattias W.
triace_coder.bio: Swedish pixel artist in Alcatraz. Master of AGA chipset graphics, creating detailed 256-color backdrops and copper-enhanced HAM8 landscapes for Alcatraz's Amiga demos.
